flashcards.back: A distributed application structure that separates the presentation layer (client) from the data storage and processing layer (server).
A request-response protocol used for transferring data over the internet.

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the HTTP GET request method?
flashcards.back: To retrieve data from the server.

flashcards.front: What is the primary function of a web browser?
What is the difference between a one-tier architecture and a two-tier architecture?
flashcards.back: One-tier architecture has a single machine, while two-tier architecture has multiple machines.
